mapper.select: SELECT s.schedule_code, s.schedule_number, s.schedule_enrol_start_date, s.schedule_enrol_end_date, s.schedule_start_date, s.schedule_start_date_add_date, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(s.schedule_after_date, '$')) AS schedule_after_date_JSON, p.program_name AS title, p.time, s.online, s.part_type, s.enrol_limit, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enroll e WHERE e.s_id = s.s_id ) AS enrol_count, s.schedule_status, s.open_status, COUNT(CASE WHEN e.attendance_type = 'Y' THEN 1 END) AS attendance_count, s.schedule_group_num, p.program_code, pc.title AS group_title FROM schedule s JOIN program p ON p.program_num = s.program_num JOIN program_category pc ON p.category_num = pc.cate_num LEFT JOIN enroll e ON e.s_id = s.s_id GROUP BY s.s_id ORDER BY s.schedule_start_date DESC

SELECT s.schedule_code, s.schedule_number, s.schedule_enrol_start_date, s.schedule_enrol_end_date, s.schedule_start_date, s.schedule_start_date_add_date, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(s.schedule_after_date, '$')) AS schedule_after_date_JSON, p.program_name AS title, p.time, s.online, s.part_type, s.enrol_limit, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enroll e WHERE e.s_id = s.s_id ) AS enrol_count, s.schedule_status, s.open_status, COUNT(CASE WHEN e.attendance_type = 'Y' THEN 1 END) AS attendance_count, s.schedule_group_num, p.program_code, pc.title AS group_title FROM schedule s JOIN program p ON p.program_num = s.program_num JOIN program_category pc ON p.category_num = pc.cate_num LEFT JOIN enroll e ON e.s_id = s.s_id WHERE s.schedule_code = #{schedule_code} GROUP BY s.s_id ORDER BY s.schedule_start_date DESC

SELECT s.schedule_code, s.schedule_number, s.schedule_enrol_start_date, s.schedule_enrol_end_date, s.schedule_start_date, s.schedule_start_date_add_date, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(s.schedule_after_date, '$')) AS schedule_after_date_JSON, p.program_name AS title, p.time, s.online, s.part_type, s.enrol_limit, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enroll e WHERE e.s_id = s.s_id ) AS enrol_count, s.schedule_status, s.open_status, s.schedule_group_num, p.program_code, pc.title AS group_title FROM schedule s JOIN program p ON p.program_num = s.program_num JOIN program_category pc ON p.category_num = pc.cate_num WHERE s.s_id = (SELECT s_id FROM enroll WHERE enrol_id = #{enroll_id})
SELECT * FROM schedule ORDER BY s_id DESC limit 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO schedule(schedule_code, schedule_enrol_start_date, schedule_enrol_end_date, schedule_start_date, online, part_type, enrol_limit, schedule_number, program_num) VALUES (#{schedule_code}, #{schedule_enrol_start_date}, #{schedule_enrol_end_date}, #{schedule_start_date}, #{online}, #{part_type}, #{enrol_limit}, #{schedule_number}, (SELECT program_num FROM program WHERE program_code = #{program_code}))
mapper.update: UPDATE schedule SET schedule_start_date = #{schedule_start_date}, online = #{online}, part_type = #{part_type}, schedule_number = #{schedule_number}, schedule_start_date_add_date = #{schedule_start_date_add_date}, schedule_after_date = #{schedule_after_date} WHERE schedule_code = #{schedule_code}

UPDATE schedule SET schedule_status = 1 - schedule_status WHERE schedule_code IN
#{schedule_code}

UPDATE schedule SET open_status = 1 - open_status WHERE schedule_code IN
#{schedule_code}
mapper.select: WITH RankedEnrollments AS ( SELECT e.enrol_id, e.s_id, e.created_at AS enrol_regdate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY e.s_id ORDER BY e.created_at ASC) AS row_num FROM enroll e ), WaitingStatus AS ( SELECT re.enrol_id, re.s_id, re.row_num > s.enrol_limit AS enrol_waiting_status FROM RankedEnrollments re JOIN schedule s ON re.s_id = s.s_id ) SELECT e.enrol_id, e.created_at AS enrol_regdate, ws.enrol_waiting_status, e.attendance_type, e.attendance_msg, e.attendance_description, member_email, member_hp, member_insa_number, u.member_no, u.member_type, u.team_name, e.login_id AS member_login_id, u.name AS member_name FROM enroll e JOIN user u ON e.login_id = u.login_id JOIN WaitingStatus ws ON e.enrol_id = ws.enrol_id WHERE e.s_id = (SELECT s_id FROM schedule WHERE schedule_code = #{schedule_code})

SELECT u.member_no, u.name, u.member_type, u.member_hp, u.member_email, s.schedule_number, s.schedule_start_date, p.program_name, u.team_name, e.created_at, e.attendance_msg, e.attendance_description FROM user u JOIN enroll e ON e.login_id = u.login_id JOIN schedule s ON e.s_id = s.s_id JOIN program p ON p.program_num = s.program_num WHERE schedule_code IN
#{schedule_code}

WITH RankedEnrollments AS ( SELECT e.enrol_id, e.s_id, e.created_at AS enrol_regdate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY e.s_id ORDER BY e.created_at ASC) AS row_num FROM enroll e ), WaitingStatus AS ( SELECT re.enrol_id, re.s_id, re.row_num > s.enrol_limit AS enrol_waiting_status FROM RankedEnrollments re JOIN schedule s ON re.s_id = s.s_id ) SELECT u.member_no, u.name, u.member_type, u.member_hp, u.member_email, s.schedule_number, s.schedule_start_date, p.program_name, u.team_name, e.created_at, e.attendance_msg, e.attendance_description FROM user u JOIN enroll e ON e.login_id = u.login_id JOIN schedule s ON e.s_id = s.s_id JOIN program p ON p.program_num = s.program_num JOIN WaitingStatus ws ON e.enrol_id = ws.enrol_id WHERE schedule_code IN
#{schedule_code} AND ws.enrol_waiting_status = false
mapper.update:
UPDATE enroll SET attendance_type = #{type}, attendance_msg = #{msg}, attendance_description = #{description} WHERE s_id = (SELECT s_id FROM schedule WHERE schedule_code = #{schedule_code}) AND login_id IN
(SELECT login_id FROM user WHERE member_no = #{member_no})
mapper.select: SELECT member_no FROM user WHERE login_id = (SELECT login_id FROM enroll WHERE enrol_id = #{enrol_id})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM enroll WHERE login_id = (SELECT login_id FROM user WHERE member_no = #{member_no}) AND s_id = (SELECT s_id FROM schedule WHERE schedule_code = #{schedule_code})
mapper.update: INSERT INTO cancel_log(reason, flag, s_id, login_id, executor) VALUES (#{reason}, '취소', (SELECT s_id FROM schedule WHERE schedule_code = #{schedule_code}), (SELECT login_id FROM user WHERE member_no = #{member_no}), #{executor})

INSERT INTO cancel_log(flag, s_id, login_id, executor) VALUES (#{flag}, (SELECT s_id FROM enroll WHERE enrol_id = #{enroll_id}), (SELECT login_id FROM user WHERE member_no = #{member_no}), #{login_id})
mapper.select: SELECT login_id AS member_login_id, name AS member_name, member_no, member_type, member_hp, member_insa_number, team_name FROM user WHERE CASE WHEN #{type} = 'login_id' THEN login_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') WHEN #{type} = 'name' THEN name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') WHEN #{type} = 'member_hp' THEN member_hp LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') WHEN #{type} = 'member_insa_number' THEN member_insa_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ELSE FALSE END;

SELECT reason AS cancel_msg, cl.created_at AS change_date, executor, flag, program_name, schedule_code, schedule_number AS schedule_index, program_name AS title FROM cancel_log cl JOIN schedule s ON cl.s_id = s.s_id JOIN program p ON s.program_num = p.program_num WHERE cl.login_id = (SELECT login_id FROM user WHERE member_no = #{member_no}) ORDER BY cl.created_at DESC

WITH RankedEnrollments AS ( SELECT e.enrol_id, e.s_id, e.login_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY e.s_id ORDER BY e.created_at ASC) AS row_num FROM enroll e ), WaitingList AS ( SELECT re.enrol_id, re.s_id, re.row_num - s.enrol_limit AS enrol_waiting_rank FROM RankedEnrollments re JOIN schedule s ON re.s_id = s.s_id WHERE re.row_num > s.enrol_limit ) SELECT e.enrol_id, COALESCE(w.enrol_waiting_rank, 0) AS enrol_waiting_rank, schedule_code, schedule_start_date, program_name AS title FROM enroll e JOIN schedule s ON e.s_id = s.s_id JOIN program p ON s.program_num = p.program_num LEFT JOIN WaitingList w ON e.enrol_id = w.enrol_id WHERE e.login_id = (SELECT login_id FROM user WHERE member_no = #{member_no}) ORDER BY e.created_at DESC

SELECT p.program_num, program_code, program_name, program_status, f.filePath AS program_header_img_url_v2, program_new_label, program_hash_tag, time, time_ment, place, program_content, category_num FROM program p JOIN file f ON p.program_num = f.program_num WHERE category_num = #{category_num}
SELECT * FROM program order by program_num desc limit 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO program(program_code, program_name, program_status, program_new_label, program_hash_tag, time, time_ment, place, program_content, category_num) VALUES (#{program_code}, #{program_name}, 'N', 'Y', #{program_hash_tag}, #{time}, #{time_ment}, #{place}, #{program_content}, (SELECT cate_num FROM program_category WHERE title = #{program_category}))
mapper.update: UPDATE program SET program_name = #{program_name}, program_new_label = #{program_new_label}, program_hash_tag = #{program_hash_tag}, time = #{time}, time_ment = #{time_ment}, place = #{place}, program_content = #{program_content}, category_num = (SELECT cate_num FROM program_category WHERE title = #{program_category}) WHERE program_num = #{program_num}
UPDATE program SET program_status = CASE WHEN program_status = 'Y' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END WHERE program_code = #{program_code}
mapper.select: SELECT id, reason, flag, cl.created_at, s_id, u.name AS login_id, u2.name AS executor FROM cancel_log cl JOIN user u ON u.login_id = cl.login_id JOIN user u2 ON u2.login_id = cl.executor WHERE flag = '취소' ORDER BY cl.created_at ASC
SELECT p.popup_id AS type, status, name FROM popup p JOIN file f ON f.popup_id = p.popup_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review(rate, contents, regdate, writer, program_num) VALUES (#{review_ring_rate}, #{review_content}, #{review_enrol_date}, #{review_name}, (SELECT program_num FROM program WHERE program_code = #{program_code}))
